form.formComment: Filly by Dirty Work facing the starter for the first time. Runner-up in a Cranbourne jump-out on March 30. Top hoop booked and a market watch advised.

form.formComment: Filly by Ghaiyyath facing the starter for the first time. Fitter for a jump-out on April 1 at Sandown-Hillside when finished fourth. Profiles well and keep onside.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Filly by Ghaiyyath facing the starter for the first time. Fitter for a jump-out on April 1 at Sandown-Hillside when finished fourth. Profiles well and keep onside.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when 2nd of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on November 20 over 1200m, nose behind Hi Val carrying 56kg at $1.60. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Rates highly on debut figure and expected to go on with it.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Resumes from a spell after only one run when 2nd of 9 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw on November 20 over 1200m, nose behind Hi Val carrying 56kg at $1.60. Looks forward enough after a recent trial win. Rates highly on debut figure and expected to go on with it.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after six months raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 9 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 10 len behind Let It Beel carrying 57kg at $6. Previously second-up came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 7 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on October 2 over 1147m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Live with 55kg at $101. Others are better placed.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Second run back. First-up after six months raced behind the speed prior to fading second last of 9 at Cranbourne Mdn-Sw on March 20 over 1400m, 10 len behind Let It Beel carrying 57kg at $6. Previously second-up came home strongly from last on the turn; 4th of 7 at Geelong Mdn-Sw on October 2 over 1147m, on a slow track; 3.5 len behind Live with 55kg at $101. Others are better placed.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early stages.
Began awkwardly, shifted out and bumped Clarification on several occasions.

form.formComment: Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 2 len behind Outer Banks carrying 56kg at $4.20. The run before that came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, slow going long-neck behind Invincible Lover with 57kg at $7.50. One of the major players.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Recent form sound. Last start 4th of 10 at Bendigo 3yo Mdn-Sw on March 27 over 1000m, 2 len behind Outer Banks carrying 56kg at $4.20. The run before that came from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 19 over 1000m, slow going long-neck behind Invincible Lover with 57kg at $7.50. One of the major players.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: Most recently 2nd in a small field at Yarra Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, slow going nose behind Our Yonglee with 57kg at $2.20. The race before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 5 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Labelmaker carrying 57kg at $2.60. Expected to be right  in the finish again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0.5). Most recently 2nd in a small field at Yarra Valley 3yo F Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1200m, slow going nose behind Our Yonglee with 57kg at $2.20. The race before that made ground from midfield; 2nd of 12 at this track Mdn-Sw on March 5 over 1400m, 0.5 len behind Labelmaker carrying 57kg at $2.60. Expected to be right  in the finish again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shifted in at the start and bumped with On The Loose.
Shortly after the start, bumped by Mahers Landing.
Held up for clear running from the 400m until approaching the 200m.

form.formComment: Resuming. Not seen since she finished last of 10 at this track Mdn-Sw November 14 over 1400m, soft track; 17 len behind Captains Choice with 56kg at $6.50. On debut third of 7 at Ballarat Mdn-Sw October 6 over 1200m, soft track; 1.3 len behind Ornithology with 55kg at $2.60. Likely to need the outing.

form.formComment: Filly by Written Tycoon facing the starter for the first time. Won a jump-out at Pakenham on March 31. Breaks from a low barrier and she's looked good in her leadups.
